历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 5208, 5422, 5898, 9660, and 4748 respectively. In 2024, there was a significant drop to 9660 (ranking number increased), and in 2025, it rebounded strongly to 4748, the best ranking in the past five years. The fluctuation range in the past five years is large, with a baseline ranking of about 4748 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing Physics Category was 30 in 2021, 29 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 32 in 2024, 31 in 2025, and 31 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 41st, with a stable and slightly rising ranking in recent years (40 in 2021 → 40 in 2022 → 43 in 2023 → 41 in 2024 → 42 in 2025 → 41 in 2026), belonging to the top 50 universities nationwide, with a relatively high level; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving historical incidents of laboratory explosions and fires, which may have a slight inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 45th (relatively hot), short video exposure is moderately high, overall attention is acceptable; no obvious record of missing admission thresholds; System Science A+, Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-. Among them, majors such as Computer, Electronic Information, and Transportation are highly matched with advantageous disciplines, having strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended in society, and competition for related major categories may intensify; the number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing increased from 98954 in 2021 to 112556 in 2022, 120872 in 2023, 132325 in 2024, and 139478 in 2025; the total number of candidates in 2026 is about 209,000, estimated at about 135,850 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 65%, a slight decrease from 2025, easing competitive pressure. Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, which has a certain regional appeal to Chongqing candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5% (15 in 2025 out of 598 nationwide), which is moderately low, not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound of the 2025 ranking to the lowest point (best ranking) in the past five years, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates, and the slightly negative university reputation, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will not continue to move significantly forward based on 2025, but will slightly move backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4778, with a range of 4278–5278.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4278–5278, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors can be attempted (requires ranking significantly better than the upper limit of the range), and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Majors such as Computer, Electronic Information, and Zhan Tianyou Class are highly competitive; candidates with rankings within 4500 are advised to consider them. Transportation, Automation, and other advantageous majors of the university offer high cost-performance, suitable for candidates with rankings in the middle of the range.
